content.query:
CREATE VIEW dbo.vwAccounts AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://crmsalesuksouthadls2.dfs.core.windows.net/transformed-data/accounts/part-00000-tid-3466074122307942658-c08a1828-eb1f-4ba6-8477-d474174fea5e-76-1-c000.csv',
    FORMAT ='CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
    HEADER_ROW  = TRUE
) AS crm_sales

CREATE VIEW dbo.vwDataDictionary AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://crmsalesuksouthadls2.dfs.core.windows.net/transformed-data/data_dictionary/part-00000-tid-7546971791739730160-4580dd92-3866-4da4-b033-891fb0143efe-77-1-c000.csv',
    FORMAT ='CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
    HEADER_ROW  = TRUE,
    FIELDTERMINATOR = ',',
    FIELDQUOTE= ''
) AS crm_sales


CREATE VIEW dbo.vwProducts AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://crmsalesuksouthadls2.dfs.core.windows.net/transformed-data/products/part-00000-tid-3940590806710983783-314c97da-c710-4e38-8785-90de915709fa-78-1-c000.csv',
    FORMAT ='CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
    HEADER_ROW  = TRUE
) AS crm_sales

CREATE VIEW dbo.vwSalesPipeline AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://crmsalesuksouthadls2.dfs.core.windows.net/transformed-data/sales_pipeline/part-00000-tid-8206082406034739231-2ef0e236-ee12-494a-b0bb-c5e2794ff565-79-1-c000.csv',
    FORMAT ='CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
    HEADER_ROW  = TRUE
) AS crm_sales

CREATE VIEW dbo.vwSalesTeams AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://crmsalesuksouthadls2.dfs.core.windows.net/transformed-data/sales_teams/part-00000-tid-5469347893168880275-9e9cb853-79cd-4018-9ced-a3a16143d99e-80-1-c000.csv',
    FORMAT ='CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
    HEADER_ROW  = TRUE
) AS crm_sales
